training_status: Marathon runner, currently ~50 mpw building to 70 mpw peak

benefits.description: Improved cardiovascular endurance during marathon; ran 3:04 with sustained high heart rate compared to previous 3:10:10 performance
Using BPC, TB500, and CJC+Ipa stack for recovery during training block

protocol_notes: Ran 3:10:10 previously at avg HR 164. With 20mg MOTS-C split over last 3 days before race, ran 3:04 with HR 164 first half and ~174 second half. Currently mid-training block at ~50 mpw, plans to use MOTS-C mid-block and again 1-2 weeks before race. Also on BPC, TB500, and CJC+Ipa stack currently.
